title: Chocolate Mini Dragees - MINI Heart Shaped Sugar Coated Confectionery - Ivory - For Wedding Favours and Baby Showers - Pack of 100 Hearts (100 Grams)
features: SAY IT WITH CHOCOLATE - these heart-shaped dragees taste as good as they look, making them perfect for any occassion, not just for Valentine's Day.
Each mini heart consists of a centre of rich dark chocolate coated in a crisp sugar shell. With many colours to choose from find something stylish to match the theme of your special occassion.
Great placed in organza bags and pillow boxes to create an impressive display for wedding favours. Equally stunning scattered on the table as edible confetti.
Each piece is 1.5cm x 1.5cm x 0.5cm and weighs 1g.

Made in Italy at the purpose-built factory in Vimercate where traditional confectionery techniques are combined with the latest state of the art technology. All the ingredients have been carefully selected for their quality and flavour, with only the most prestigious cocoa chosen from the best Africa and Latin America plantations.
description: Product Description Classic confectionery from Italy. The perfect choice for wedding favours. Luxury confectionery for that special occasion.

specifications_table.Occasion: Anniversary, Mothers Day, New Baby, Valentines Day, Wedding
